sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_char (id Int32, byte_values Array(UInt8));
SELECT id, char(arrayJoin(byte_values)) AS string_representation FROM test_char WHERE char(0, 1, 2) > char(0, 0);
SELECT id, char(65 + id, 66 + id, 67 + id) AS character_sequence FROM test_char WHERE char(arrayJoin(byte_values)) > 'ABC' ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE test_comparison (value1 Int32, value2 Int32, value3 Int32);
SELECT value1, value2, value3, char(value2) AS char_value FROM test_comparison WHERE char(value1) > char(value2);
WITH (SELECT count(*) AS cnt FROM test_comparison WHERE value1 > value2) AS inner_query SELECT value1, value2, char(value1) AS char_val FROM test_comparison WHERE cnt > 0;
SELECT value1, char(100 / NULLIF(value2, 0), value3) AS calculated_char FROM test_comparison WHERE char(255) > char(value3);
SELECT id, char(0xE4, 0xBD, 0xA0) AS utf8_string FROM test_char WHERE char(65.7, 66.3) > char(65, 66);
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, char(byte_values) AS full_string FROM test_char; SELECT * FROM temp_table WHERE char(255) > '';
SELECT id FROM test_char WHERE char(arrayJoin(byte_values)) IS NOT NULL HAVING count(*) > 0;
